test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_u64_left_{card} (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
CREATE TABLE test_u64_right_{card} (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_u64_left_{card} SELECT number % {card} FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO test_u64_right_{card} SELECT number FROM numbers({card})
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_str_left (k String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
CREATE TABLE test_str_right (k String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_str_left SELECT toString(number % 100) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO test_str_right SELECT toString(number) FROM numbers(100)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_lc_left (k LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
CREATE TABLE test_lc_right (k LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_lc_left SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % 100)) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO test_lc_right SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number)) FROM numbers(100)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_u64_left_{card} AS a JOIN test_u64_right_{card} AS b ON a.k = b.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'full_sorting_merge'
SELECT count() FROM test_str_left AS a JOIN test_str_right AS b ON a.k = b.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'full_sorting_merge'
SELECT count() FROM test_lc_left AS a JOIN test_lc_right AS b ON a.k = b.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'full_sorting_merge'
